genre_preference.value: action, drama, romance, comedy, war, historical
evidence: "Great action/drame movie. Denzel has never been better."
"One of the best Romance films--ever! Very unique. In a class by itself."
"The story is really lame and hard to follow."
"Sometimes a franchise over extends its stay. Such is the case with this movie."
"Great film that never stops to take a breath."
"This is unquestionably the best 'Expendables Movie' made to date."
"The quality of this B&W 50+ yr old movie is fantastic. Criterion does this better than anyone!"
"The quality of the picture & sound on Blu Ray is excellent."
"Cary Grant gives one of the best (and I believe under rated) performances of his stellar career."
"Denzel is excellent in his role. He should do more of these."
"If possible, watch it in 3D. It is much more enjoyable that way and the action seems to be perfect for 3D."
"The quality of this B&W 50+ yr old movie is fantastic."
"I enjoyed watching the movie, especially since my church had studied the Book of Daniel last year."
"One of my favorite comedies of all time."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly action, drama, and romance, with a preference for fast-paced narratives. They value high production quality and show some loyalty to notable actors, while their emotional engagement appears to be moderate.
